title: Random_block_drops
description: Makes all blocks drop random items
body:
# Random drops
This datapack makes it so that all blocks has random drops
(when they have drops that is)
for example breaking a block such as dirt will give you a random drop every time
but a block such as leaves will only drop you a random block the times the leaves would have dropped an item such as an apple or sappling

the mod is made to be a challange to spice up the game for those who are looking to ad more fun to their minecraft experience.
recomend playing with friends
